final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo for a Weibo news/trending-topic banner image, urban dusk cityscape with dramatic light.

Style/medium: photorealistic documentary photography, handheld mobile reportage aesthetic, sharp editorial detail, high-contrast dusk tones in the spirit of street photojournalism
Composition: wide 16:9 horizontal frame, deep perspective cityscape, generous left/upper-zone negative space reserved for headline text overlay, foreground pedestrians in motion blur, distant skyline as anchor
Subject: bustling city street at golden hour — hurrying pedestrians silhouetted against fading daylight, high-rise buildings reflecting warm sunset glow on glass facades, neon signs beginning to illuminate
Scene/backdrop: urban downtown at dusk, layered skyline with skyscrapers, street-level crowd, neon storefronts flickering on, hazy atmospheric depth
Lighting/mood: dramatic split between warm amber sunset backlight on buildings and cool emerging neon glow at street level, hard rim light on pedestrian silhouettes, high tonal contrast, emotionally charged yet quietly intimate
Color palette: deep amber and burnt orange in the sky as dominant, cool blue-purple shadows at street level, scattered neon pink/cyan accents, rich shadow detail
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" as bold prominent headline in modern black sans-serif; "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" as subtitle beneath; "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" as small watermark at bottom-right corner
Constraints: all three text elements must be legible; headline placed in upper or center-left zone with clear background contrast; watermark at bottom-right at reduced opacity; image must read as authentic on-scene Weibo trending post cover
Avoid: studio lighting, artificial HDR glow, over-saturated sunset clichés, blurry unreadable text, cluttered composition with no breathing room, generic stock-photo feel
